title: elatostema goudotianum var. manongarivense
intro: Elatostema goudotianum var. manongarivense is a plant species known for its medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and preventing infections. In traditional medicine, Elatostema goudotianum var. manongarivense is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application.
